src/main/java/com/test/catalog/applicati._comment: Phase 3 #1C: a scaffold query handler whose aggregate has a repository must inject the primary repository (ProductRepository), even though the body is still a TODO.

contains: SELECT p FROM ProductJpa p WHERE p.status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT p FROM ProductJpa p WHERE (:categoryId IS NULL OR p.categoryId = :categoryId)
SELECT p FROM ProductJpa p WHERE p.id IN :productIds
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(p) > 0 THEN true ELSE false END FROM ProductJpa p WHERE p.status = 'ACTIVE' AND p.categoryId = :categoryId
SELECT COUNT(p) FROM ProductJpa p WHERE p.status = 'ACTIVE' AND p.categoryId = :categoryId
